data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of a reminder before the hold expires, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is being executed. The linked use case mentions a reminder, but the prior steps do not provide any evidence of the system sending such reminders. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a reminder being sent before the hold expires.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
